title: Nyanform configuration
description: Configuration file for the Nyanform MCP compatibility proxy. Loaded by Nyanform.Config.Loader.

downstream.description: Transport facing the MCP client. Defaults to stdio.

port.description: TCP port for HTTP downstream. Ignored when transport is stdio. Defaults to 8080.

host.description: Bind address for HTTP downstream. Defaults to 127.0.0.1. Use 0.0.0.0 to expose externally (not recommended without TLS).

allowedOrigins.description: HTTP Origin values accepted by the downstream server. With an empty list, requests without Origin are accepted; browser Origins are accepted only for loopback Origins on a loopback bind. Non-loopback binds require an explicit list for Origin-bearing requests.

upstream.description: Transport facing the MCP server. Exactly one of command (stdio) or endpoint (http) must be provided.

command.description: For stdio transport. The argv passed to spawn_executable. The first element is the executable, the rest are arguments. No shell is used.

endpoint.description: For http transport. The full URL of the upstream MCP server (e.g. https://internal.example.com/mcp).

env.description: Environment variables passed to a stdio upstream. Only these keys are propagated; the parent environment is not inherited wholesale.

profile.description: Compatibility profile used to project upstream schemas. Use auto to detect from clientInfo.name at initialize time.

policy.description: Projection policy. strict rejects lossy and rejected omens; compatible rejects only rejected; permissive accepts everything.

envAllowlist.description: Additional parent environment variables inherited by a stdio upstream. A minimal set of system variables needed to launch processes is always inherited, and explicit upstream.env values override inherited values.

timeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds, applied to both upstream GenServer calls and Req receive_timeout.

maxMessageSize.description: Maximum size in bytes of a single JSON-RPC frame before it is rejected as too large. Checked before JSON decoding.

maxHttpBodySize.description: Maximum size in bytes of an HTTP request body accepted by the downstream HTTP server.

logging.description: Log verbosity. quiet suppresses info, verbose enables debug-level metadata.

toolInclude.description: Allowlist of tool names to expose to the client. If omitted, all upstream tools are exposed. Mutually exclusive with toolExclude in practice.

toolExclude.description: Blocklist of tool names to hide from the client. If omitted, no tools are excluded.
